summary: InspectionsPage UX Improvements Testing Complete - All 5 features verified. Table layout has no horizontal scrollbar, Date/Time column shows date on top and time below, Vehicle column shows parsed make/model (e.g., 'Ford Endeavour' not 'FORD INDIA PVT LTD'), Change Vehicle modal shows parsed current vehicle, Vaahan API search shows parsed make/model. Fixed axios import bug in fetchMechanics function.

issues: React hydration warning: <tr> cannot be a child of <span> - This is a console warning in React dev mode, not affecting functionality

table_no_horizontal_scrollbar.details: Table uses table-fixed class with percentage-based column widths (9%, 16%, 13%, 13%, 14%, 13%, 9%, 13%). No horizontal scrollbar present.

date_time_column_structure.details: Date/Time column shows date on top (e.g., '15 Feb '26') and time below (e.g., '12:00 PM') using flex-col layout

vehicle_column_parsed_make_model.details: Vehicle column shows parsed make/model: 'Toyota Camry', 'Ford Endeavour', 'Hyundai Innova', 'Maruti Suzuki Innova', 'Honda City'

change_vehicle_modal_current_vehicle.details: Modal shows 'Current Vehicle: KA05NC8137 (Toyota Camry)' with parsed make/model

change_vehicle_modal_vaahan_search.details: Vaahan API search returns parsed results: Make: 'Tata', Model: 'INDIGO'. extractMake and extractModel functions correctly parse verbose API strings.

all_table_columns_readable.details: All 8 columns (Date/Time, Customer, Vehicle, Payment, Status, Mechanic, Location, Report) are properly sized and readable

axios_not_defined.issue: fetchMechanics function used axios directly without import
axios_not_defined.fix: Changed to use mechanicsApi.getAll() from services/api and added mechanicsApi to imports

critical_code_review_comments: extractMake() function (lines 22-70) correctly parses verbose manufacturer strings like 'FORD INDIA PVT LTD' to 'Ford'
extractModel() function (lines 73-189) correctly parses verbose model strings like '3.2 ENDEAVOUR 4 4 AT TITANIUM' to 'Endeavour'
Table uses table-fixed class with percentage-based column widths to prevent horizontal scrollbar
Date/Time column uses flex-col layout to show date on top and time below
Vehicle column displays parsed make/model using extractMake() and extractModel() functions
Change Vehicle modal correctly applies extractMake() and extractModel() to both current vehicle and Vaahan API search results
seed_data_used: Existing inspection data with various vehicle makes/models
context_for_next_testing_agent: InspectionsPage UX improvements fully implemented and tested. extractMake() and extractModel() functions parse verbose Vaahan API strings to clean names. Table layout uses table-fixed with percentage widths. Fixed axios import bug in fetchMechanics function.

mocked_apis.note: Using real Vaahan API for vehicle details
